skills.description: Validate SKILL.md files against the agentskills specification and Anthropic best practices, catching structural errors, semantic contradictions, naming anti-patterns, and quality gaps in a single read-only pass.
trigger_conditions: Use when reviewing a skill before publishing to a marketplace
Use when debugging why a skill doesn't trigger correctly
Use when onboarding a team to skill authoring standards
anti_triggers: Do NOT use for anti-slop detection
or token analysis; use [SkillCheck Pro](https://getskillcheck.com) for those

skills.description: Iteratively improve a Claude Code skill using the skill-reviewer agent until it meets quality standards.
trigger_conditions: Improving a skill with multiple quality issues
Iterating on a new skill until it meets standards
Automated fix-review cycles instead of manual editing

skills.description: Scan agent skills for security issues before adoption. Detects prompt injection, malicious code, excessive permissions, secret exposure, and supply chain risks.
trigger_conditions: User provides a skill directory path
User names a specific skill to scan
User requests to scan all skills
anti_triggers: Running the scanner on arbitrary code without context

skills.description: Automatically convert documentation websites, GitHub repositories, and PDFs into Claude AI skills in minutes.
trigger_conditions: Need to work with documentation websites
Want to convert GitHub repositories into AI skills
Looking to automatically convert PDFs into AI skills
anti_triggers: Working with sensitive data that requires strict privacy controls
